falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,500 (key resistance from bottom_2024_aug) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout would indicate bullish momentum invalidating the 'hold' signal and suggesting a reversal of the prior bearish pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 200-day average volume for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate a market-wide shift in sentiment, contradicting the 'unknown' phase and suggesting a clear directional move

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% and holds above that level for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal strong inflationary pressures or economic acceleration, directly contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and invalidating the current hold signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
